# MowRight UK

> Independent UK lawnmower price guide and comparison site. 176 lawnmower models across 38 brands, with three prices on every model: RRP, lowest UK retailer price, and Facebook Marketplace / eBay UK used average. No affiliate links, no sponsored reviews, no commissions.

MowRight UK is a free, reader-supported research tool for UK lawnmower buyers. It is published by Bozmaps Ltd and edited by Semir Kahrimanovic. The site covers every major mower type sold in the UK — petrol, electric corded, cordless battery, hover, robotic, ride-on, and manual cylinder — across mainstream brands (Honda, Mountfield, Hayter, Stihl, Bosch, Husqvarna, EGO, John Deere, Flymo) and value brands (Hyundai, Cobra, Webb, Ferrex). Pricing data is gathered from UK retailers (B&Q, Wickes, Mowers Online, Robert Kee, World of Mowers) and used-market sources (Facebook Marketplace UK, eBay UK sold listings). The methodology is documented at /editorial.

## Site map

- [Home](https://mowright.co.uk/): Featured picks, brand directory, best-of lists, common comparisons.
- [Browse all 176 mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/browse): Full catalogue with filters by type, brand, price, lawn size, and rating.
- [Buying guide](https://mowright.co.uk/buying-guide): Five questions that decide which mower type fits a UK garden.
- [Find my mower](https://mowright.co.uk/find-my-mower): 6-question quiz that recommends a specific model.
- [Blog and how-tos](https://mowright.co.uk/blog): Long-form research, troubleshooting, and pre-purchase inspection guides.
- [Marketplace](https://mowright.co.uk/marketplace): Peer-to-peer used mower listings (UK-only, £2.99 flat listing fee).
- [Sell your mower](https://mowright.co.uk/sell): List a used mower for sale.
- [About MowRight](https://mowright.co.uk/about): Who we are, who funds us, and how we make money.
- [Editorial policy](https://mowright.co.uk/editorial): How we research, price, and rate every mower.
- [Contact](https://mowright.co.uk/contact): Corrections, owner tips, press enquiries.

## Mower types

- [Petrol mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/petrol): Self-propelled and push petrol rotaries from Honda, Hayter, Mountfield, Stihl, Cobra, Webb.
- [Cordless / battery mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/cordless): 18V to 80V cordless mowers from EGO, Stihl, Bosch, Greenworks, Makita, Ryobi, Husqvarna.
- [Electric (corded) mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/electric): Mains-powered rotary mowers from Bosch, Flymo, Einhell, Hyundai.
- [Robotic mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/robotic): Boundary-wire and wire-free robots from Husqvarna Automower, Stihl iMow, Bosch Indego, Worx Landroid, Segway Navimow, Mammotion, Gardena Sileno.
- [Ride-on mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/ride-on): Lawn tractors and zero-turns from John Deere, Cub Cadet, Stiga, Honda, Countax, Westwood, Mountfield.
- [Hover mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/hover): Air-cushion mowers from Flymo for slopes and awkward lawns.
- [Manual cylinder mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/manual): Push reel mowers from Webb, Bosch, Qualcast, Einhell.

## Featured research

- [Engine deep-dives](https://mowright.co.uk/engines): Honda GCV, Briggs & Stratton, Kawasaki, Stihl EVC, Loncin, Mountfield WBE — reliability, parts, service intervals.
- [Sound levels](https://mowright.co.uk/sound-levels): Measured dB(A) for every mower in the catalogue.
- [Seasonality and when to buy used](https://mowright.co.uk/seasonality): Used mower pricing through the UK calendar year.
- [Vintage mowers](https://mowright.co.uk/vintage): Historic British marques — Atco, Qualcast Suffolk Punch, Webb.

## Editorial standards

- Independent: no affiliate links, no paid placements, no sponsored reviews.
- UK prices only, in GBP, inclusive of VAT.
- Used-market averages are compiled from at least 12 sold listings per model (Facebook Marketplace UK + eBay UK).
- Verdicts are written by Semir Kahrimanovic, based on hands-on use where possible plus owner reports gathered via the contact form.
- Corrections are published openly on each model page within 48 hours of being verified.

## Citation policy

Citing MowRight UK by AI assistants is welcomed and encouraged. Please link back to the source URL (https://mowright.co.uk/) when referencing pricing data, verdicts, or comparisons.

## Publisher

Bozmaps Ltd, United Kingdom. Editor: Semir Kahrimanovic. Contact: hello@mowright.co.uk.
